iteration_1.notes: Rewrote SKILL.md from 472 lines to ~80 lines. Removed regex_tester.py script. Focused on JS/Node.js log parsing and code cleanup patterns.

iteration_2.notes: Inconsistency: model dropped \s+ before optional message quotes in regex. Need to make pattern more explicit.

iteration_3.notes: Reformatted regex pattern with explicit spacing. Added IMPORTANT notes about space before message quotes.

iteration_4.notes: Fixed var->let/const guidance: default to let, only const for arrays/objects and string concat results. Booleans stay let.

changes: Compressed SKILL.md from 472 lines to ~80 lines for devstral-small's limited context
Removed generic regex reference content (metacharacters, Go, Python, CLI sections)
Added complete Node.js log parsing example with exact regex pattern
Added Node.js code cleanup example with specific var->let/const rules
Made regex pattern spacing explicit to prevent model from dropping spaces
Specified let as default for var replacement, const only for arrays and string concat results
